title: Intermission Chapter - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
**The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II**

After you have finished the event scene , visit each room. They are all marked with a **red exclamation mark** on the map.

*   Scarlet - South Area (Southeast Room)
*   Vulcan - South Area (Northeast Room)
*   Bleublanc - Dining Table (Center)
*   Xeno & Leonidas - North Area (Southeast Room)
*   McBurn - North Area (Northeast Room)
*   Duvalie - North Area (Southwest Room)
*   Altina - North Area (Northwest Room)

After you have spoken to all the everyone listed above, move to the second floor and go north to the guest room. Knock on the door. Watch the event, after this scene, Rean will get the **Spirit Unification** ability. Head downstairs and go to your room (South Area, Southwest corner). Examine the air ducts by the flower vase. Go all the way to the end, after this, you will be facing a few battles.

\- Advertisement -

|  |
| --- |
| Alliance Forces Soldier x2 | HP: 9600 | Item Drop: Teara Balm, EP Charge II |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| This is the same type of soldiers you fought at the watchtower. The soldiers actually can do a ton of damage and can even heal themselves with arts. Best thing to do is use Alfin's arts, it should deal enough damage to destroy them in three blows. You should cancel the Soldier's casting with Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter when the opportunity comes. When Rean's HP drops very low, use Alfin to heal him. |

[![Trails of cold steel ii pantagruel.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/6/65/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_pantagruel.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_pantagruel.png)

| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Tri-Attacker R2 | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Tri-Attacker HG | EP Charge II | U-Material |
| Doven Kaiser | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Provincial Army Soldier | Teara Balm | EP Charge II |
| Phalanx J9 | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Celestial Balm | Pantagruel |
| Orange Cape |
| Tearal Balm |

After defeating the soldiers, continue along the linear path. You'll come across two rooms. Go to the room to the west to find a **Celestial Balm**, and the room to the east for an **Orange Cape**. Return to the main path and you'll encounter another group of soldiers. Defeat them and continue. When you reach the Orbment Charging Station at the southern end, make sure to heal up and enter the room for an upcoming boss fight.

|  |
| --- |
| Duvalie | HP: 85316 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 90, 90, 90, 90 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ☆☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ☆☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
|  |
| Bleublanc | HP: 96640 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 90, 90, 90, 90 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ☆☆☆☆ Pierce: ☆☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| There isn't much to note about this boss fight. Just ensure that you scan both of the bosses. You only need to reduce about 50% of either boss's health to win. Using an S-Craft will do nearly enough damage to finish the fight. After that, a few more regular attacks should bring the battle to an end. |
|  |
| --- |
| Crow | HP: 96640 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 90, 90, 90, 90 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ☆☆☆☆ Pierce: ☆☆☆☆ Strike:☆☆☆☆ |
| A pretty easy boss fight, you just exchange attacks with Crow. If you see a turn order bonus like critical, use your S-Craft during this moment. When Crow's HP drop below 50%, make sure your HP is higher than 7000, Crow might use his S-Craft and can kill you instantly if your HP is too low. |

* * *
